task.title: Add latest badge for the most recent history item

new_contents:
<view class="page">
  <view class="hero">
    <text class="title">{{title}}</text>
    <text class="description">{{description}}</text>
  </view>

  <view class="stack">
    <block wx:for="{{modules}}" wx:key="name">
      <view class="module">
        <text class="module-name">{{item.name}}</text>
        <text class="module-status">{{item.status}}</text>
      </view>
    </block>
  </view>

  <view class="action-card">
    <text class="action-title">Cloud Function Check</text>
    <text class="action-desc">{{statusText}}</text>
    <text class="meta-line">call count: {{callCount}}</text>
    <text wx:if="{{lastMessage}}" class="meta-line">last message: {{lastMessage}}</text>
    <view class="preset-row">
      <block wx:for="{{presets}}" wx:key="label">
        <view class="preset-chip {{selectedPreset === item.value ? 'preset-chip-active' : ''}}">
          <button
            class="preset-button {{selectedPreset === item.value ? 'preset-button-active' : ''}}"
            data-value="{{item.value}}"
            bindtap="fillPreset"
            disabled="{{loading}}"
          >
            {{item.label}}
          </button>
          <button
            wx:if="{{!item.builtin}}"
            class="preset-remove"
            data-value="{{item.value}}"
            bindtap="removePreset"
            disabled="{{loading}}"
          >
            x
          </button>
        </view>
      </block>
    </view>
    <input
      class="input"
      type="text"
      value="{{inputValue}}"
      placeholder="Type something to echo"
      bindinput="handleInputChange"
    />
    <button class="action-button" bindtap="callHelloLab" loading="{{loading}}">
      Call helloLab
    </button>
    <button class="ghost-button" bindtap="saveCurrentAsPreset" disabled="{{loading}}">
      Save as preset
    </button>
    <button class="ghost-button" bindtap="renameSelectedPreset" disabled="{{loading}}">
      Rename selected preset
    </button>
    <button class="ghost-button" bindtap="restoreDefaultPreset" disabled="{{loading}}">
      Restore default preset
    </button>
    <button class="ghost-button" bindtap="clearResult" disabled="{{loading}}">
      Clear result
    </button>
  </view>

  <view wx:if="{{lastSuccess}}" class="summary-card">
    <text class="result-title">Last successful run</text>
    <text class="result-line">input: {{lastSuccess.input}}</text>
    <text class="result-line">message: {{lastSuccess.message}}</text>
    <text class="result-line">timestamp: {{lastSuccess.timestamp}}</text>
    <button class="ghost-button summary-button" bindtap="useLastSuccessInput" disabled="{{loading}}">
      Use summary input
    </button>
    <button class="ghost-button summary-button" bindtap="saveSummaryAsPreset" disabled="{{loading}}">
      Save summary as preset
    </button>
    <button class="ghost-button summary-button" bindtap="clearLastSuccess" disabled="{{loading}}">
      Clear summary
    </button>
  </view>

  <view wx:if="{{result}}" class="result-card">
    <text class="result-title">Result</text>
    <text class="result-line">code: {{result.code}}</text>
    <text class="result-line">msg: {{result.msg}}</text>
    <text wx:if="{{result.data}}" class="result-line">message: {{result.data.message}}</text>
    <text wx:if="{{result.data && result.data.echo}}" class="result-line">input: {{result.data.echo.input}}</text>
    <text wx:if="{{result.data && result.data.echo}}" class="result-line">source: {{result.data.echo.source}}</text>
    <text wx:if="{{result.data}}" class="result-line">timestamp: {{result.data.timestamp}}</text>
  </view>

  <view wx:if="{{history.length}}" class="history-card">
    <text class="result-title">Recent inputs</text>
    <button class="ghost-button history-button" bindtap="clearHistory" disabled="{{loading}}">
      Clear history
    </button>
    <button class="ghost-button history-button" bindtap="useLatestHistoryInput" disabled="{{loading || !history.length}}">
      Use latest input
    </button>
    <block wx:for="{{history}}" wx:key="timestamp">
      <view class="history-row">
        <view class="history-main" data-value="{{item.input}}" bindtap="refillFromHistory">
          <text class="history-input">{{item.input}}</text>
          <text class="history-time">{{item.timestamp}}</text>
          <text wx:if="{{index === 0}}" class="history-badge">latest</text>
        </view>
        <button
          class="history-run-button"
          data-value="{{item.input}}"
          bindtap="rerunHistory"
          disabled="{{loading}}"
        >
          Run again
        </button>
      </view>
    </block>
  </view>
  <view wx:else class="history-card history-empty">
    <text class="result-title">Recent inputs</text>
    <text class="result-line">Run helloLab once to populate history.</text>
  </view>
</view>





.page {
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 40rpx 32rpx;
  background: #f8fafc;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.hero {
  margin-bottom: 28rpx;
}

.title {
  display: block;
  font-size: 40rpx;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 10rpx;
}

.description {
  display: block;
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 26rpx;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.stack {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20rpx;
  margin-bottom: 28rpx;
}

.module {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 22rpx 24rpx;
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 20rpx;
  box-shadow: 0 12rpx 32rpx rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);
}

.module-name {
  font-size: 28rpx;
}

.module-status {
  font-size: 24rpx;
  color: #0f766e;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.action-card,
.summary-card,
.result-card,
.history-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 20rpx;
  padding: 24rpx;
  box-shadow: 0 12rpx 32rpx rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);
  margin-bottom: 24rpx;
}

.action-title,
.result-title {
  display: block;
  font-size: 30rpx;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 12rpx;
}

.action-desc,
.result-line {
  display: block;
  font-size: 26rpx;
  color: #475569;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.meta-line {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 8rpx;
  font-size: 24rpx;
  color: #334155;
}

.preset-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 14rpx;
  margin-top: 18rpx;
}

.preset-chip {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8rpx;
  padding-right: 10rpx;
  background: #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 999rpx;
}

.preset-chip-active {
  background: #0f172a;
}

.preset-button {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0 24rpx;
  min-width: 0;
  line-height: 1.9;
  background: transparent;
  color: #0f172a;
  border-radius: 999rpx;
  font-size: 24rpx;
}

.preset-button-active {
  color: #ffffff;
}

.preset-remove {
  margin: 0;
  min-width: 40rpx;
  padding: 0 10rpx;
  line-height: 1.6;
  background: transparent;
  color: #475569;
  border-radius: 999rpx;
  font-size: 22rpx;
}

.preset-chip-active .preset-remove {
  color: #cbd5e1;
}

.input {
  width: 100%;
  margin-top: 18rpx;
  padding: 18rpx 20rpx;
  border: 1rpx solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 16rpx;
  background: #f8fafc;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-size: 26rpx;
}

.action-button {
  margin-top: 20rpx;
  background: #0f172a;
  color: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 999rpx;
  font-size: 28rpx;
}

.ghost-button {
  margin-top: 16rpx;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #0f172a;
  border: 1rpx solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 999rpx;
  font-size: 28rpx;
}

.history-button {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 16rpx;
}

.summary-button {
  margin-top: 18rpx;
}

.history-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 18rpx;
  padding: 14rpx 0;
  border-top: 1rpx solid #e5e7eb;
}

.history-row:first-of-type {
  border-top: 0;
}

.history-main {
  flex: 1;
}

.history-input,
.history-time {
  display: block;
  font-size: 24rpx;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.history-input {
  color: #0f172a;
}

.history-time {
  color: #64748b;
}

.history-badge {
  margin-top: 6rpx;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 2rpx 14rpx;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #203040;
  color: #eaf2fb;
  font-size: 18rpx;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}

.history-run-button {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0 22rpx;
  min-width: 0;
  line-height: 1.8;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #0f172a;
  border: 1rpx solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 999rpx;
  font-size: 22rpx;
}

requirements.description: Highlight the newest history row with a latest badge so users can spot the most recent input quickly.
acceptance: The most recent history row shows a latest badge.
Other rows do not show the badge.
